Skip to contents
VaccineValidateR 0.0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Articles

Evaluate Visits for Immunization Status

Source: R/evaluate_visits.R
evaluate_visits.Rd

This function evaluates a list of visits to determine whether each immunization that could have been given was given, and if not, whether it was delayed, at the antigen level.

Usage

evaluate_visits(
  visit_data,
  antigens,
  patients = NULL,
  full_return = FALSE,
  antigen_to_eval = c("ALL"),
  study_id_column_name = "STUDY_ID",
  date_of_birth_column_name = "DOB",
  visit_date_column_name = "VISIT_DATE",
  verbose = TRUE
)

Arguments

visit_data

A data.table of visit records. Must contain at least a study ID, DOB (or be linked via patients), and a visit date column.

antigens

A data.table of antigen-level results, typically the antigens element from validate_immunizations(). Required. Must include ANTIGEN, DATE_GIVEN, VALID, and series/delay fields (see ANTIGEN_RETURN_COLUMNS).

patients

A data.table of patient info, with at least STUDY_ID and DOB. Required if DOB is not present in visit_data.

full_return

Logical. Default is FALSE. If TRUE, returns all visit–antigen combinations. If FALSE, excludes rows where the patient has aged out, the series was completed previously, or the visit occurred before the earliest allowable dose date.

antigen_to_eval

Character vector of antigens to evaluate. Default is "ALL".

study_id_column_name

Name of the column in visit_data containing study IDs. Default is "STUDY_ID".

date_of_birth_column_name

Name of the column in visit_data for dates of birth. Default is "DOB".

visit_date_column_name

Name of the column in visit_data for visit dates. Default is "VISIT_DATE".

verbose

Logical. If TRUE, prints messages during processing. Default is TRUE.

Value

A data.table containing:

  • All standardized columns in VISIT_RETURN_COLUMNS

  • All original columns from visit_data

Temporary evaluation fields are excluded.

Details

When full_return = FALSE, the output excludes visits where:

  • The patient has aged out for that antigen

  • The series was already completed before the visit

  • The visit occurred before the minimum allowable dose date

This keeps only visit–antigen combinations that could meaningfully be evaluated.

The returned data.table always contains the standardized set of columns defined in VISIT_RETURN_COLUMNS, plus all columns originally present in visit_data. Temporary internal columns (e.g., JOIN_DATE, TOMORROW, YESTERDAY) are dropped.

Note

Using full_return = TRUE can produce very large outputs and run slowly, since it evaluates every possible visit–antigen pair regardless of clinical relevance. Use with caution for large cohorts.

See also

validate_immunizations, VISIT_RETURN_COLUMNS

Examples

library(data.table)

# Minimal toy data
visits <- data.table(
  STUDY_ID = 1,
  VISIT_DATE = as.Date("2025-01-01"),
  DOB = as.Date("2024-01-01")
)
# antigens is an output from \code{\link{validate_immunizations}}

# Evaluate visits (full return = FALSE trims unnecessary rows)
evaluate_visits(visits, antigens, patients = NULL, full_return = FALSE)
#> Starting evaluation process for visits. Validating inputs.
#> validate_immunizations check complete - formatting data. This may take a while...
#> 
Processed 7 groups out of 15. 47% done. Time elapsed: 3s. ETA: 4s.
Processed 11 groups out of 15. 73% done. Time elapsed: 6s. ETA: 2s.
Processed 13 groups out of 15. 87% done. Time elapsed: 7s. ETA: 1s.
Processed 15 groups out of 15. 100% done. Time elapsed: 7s. ETA: 0s.
#> Data formatting completed, moving onto visit-antigen validate_immunizations.
#> Evaluating status of visits for POLIO vaccination status.
#> --Start with yesterday - calculate next date an immunization is due and previous dose information.
#> --Determine if a dose was given at the day of the visit and if so, was it delayed.
#> --Add in content from the next possible antigen given.
#> Evaluating status of visits for HIB vaccination status.
#> --Start with yesterday - calculate next date an immunization is due and previous dose information.
#> --Determine if a dose was given at the day of the visit and if so, was it delayed.
#> --Add in content from the next possible antigen given.
#> Evaluating status of visits for PCV vaccination status.
#> --Start with yesterday - calculate next date an immunization is due and previous dose information.
#> --Determine if a dose was given at the day of the visit and if so, was it delayed.
#> --Add in content from the next possible antigen given.
#> Evaluating status of visits for HEPA vaccination status.
#> --Start with yesterday - calculate next date an immunization is due and previous dose information.
#> --Determine if a dose was given at the day of the visit and if so, was it delayed.
#> --Add in content from the next possible antigen given.
#> Evaluating status of visits for HEPB vaccination status.
#> --Start with yesterday - calculate next date an immunization is due and previous dose information.
#> --Determine if a dose was given at the day of the visit and if so, was it delayed.
#> --Add in content from the next possible antigen given.
#> Evaluating status of visits for HPV vaccination status.
#> --Start with yesterday - calculate next date an immunization is due and previous dose information.
#> --Determine if a dose was given at the day of the visit and if so, was it delayed.
#> --Add in content from the next possible antigen given.
#> Evaluating status of visits for MCV vaccination status.
#> --Start with yesterday - calculate next date an immunization is due and previous dose information.
#> --Determine if a dose was given at the day of the visit and if so, was it delayed.
#> --Add in content from the next possible antigen given.
#> Evaluating status of visits for MENB vaccination status.
#> --Start with yesterday - calculate next date an immunization is due and previous dose information.
#> --Determine if a dose was given at the day of the visit and if so, was it delayed.
#> --Add in content from the next possible antigen given.
#> Evaluating status of visits for TETANUS vaccination status.
#> --Start with yesterday - calculate next date an immunization is due and previous dose information.
#> --Determine if a dose was given at the day of the visit and if so, was it delayed.
#> --Add in content from the next possible antigen given.
#> Evaluating status of visits for ROTA vaccination status.
#> --Start with yesterday - calculate next date an immunization is due and previous dose information.
#> --Determine if a dose was given at the day of the visit and if so, was it delayed.
#> --Add in content from the next possible antigen given.
#> Evaluating status of visits for COVID vaccination status.
#> --Start with yesterday - calculate next date an immunization is due and previous dose information.
#> --Determine if a dose was given at the day of the visit and if so, was it delayed.
#> --Add in content from the next possible antigen given.
#> Evaluating status of visits for RSV vaccination status.
#> --Start with yesterday - calculate next date an immunization is due and previous dose information.
#> --Determine if a dose was given at the day of the visit and if so, was it delayed.
#> --Add in content from the next possible antigen given.
#> Evaluating status of visits for MMR vaccination status.
#> --Start with yesterday - calculate next date an immunization is due and previous dose information.
#> --Determine if a dose was given at the day of the visit and if so, was it delayed.
#> --Add in content from the next possible antigen given.
#> Evaluating status of visits for VZV vaccination status.
#> --Start with yesterday - calculate next date an immunization is due and previous dose information.
#> --Determine if a dose was given at the day of the visit and if so, was it delayed.
#> --Add in content from the next possible antigen given.
#> Evaluating status of visits for INFLUENZA vaccination status.
#> --Start with yesterday - calculate next date an immunization is due and previous dose information.
#> --Determine if a dose was given at the day of the visit and if so, was it delayed.
#> --Add in content from the next possible antigen given.
#> Evaluation completed for all visits. Preparing return object as visit-antigen relation table.
#> See ?VISIT_RETURN_DEFS for explanations of return columns.
#>     STUDY_ID VISIT_DATE ANTIGEN IS_VIRAL_SEASON        DOB AGED_OUT
#>        <int>     <Date>  <char>          <lgcl>     <Date>   <lgcl>
#>  1:        1 2025-01-01   POLIO            TRUE 2024-01-01    FALSE
#>  2:        1 2025-01-01     HIB            TRUE 2024-01-01    FALSE
#>  3:        1 2025-01-01     PCV            TRUE 2024-01-01    FALSE
#>  4:        1 2025-01-01    HEPA            TRUE 2024-01-01    FALSE
#>  5:        1 2025-01-01    HEPB            TRUE 2024-01-01    FALSE
#>  6:        1 2025-01-01 TETANUS            TRUE 2024-01-01    FALSE
#>  7:        1 2025-01-01   COVID            TRUE 2024-01-01    FALSE
#>  8:        1 2025-01-01     RSV            TRUE 2024-01-01    FALSE
#>  9:        1 2025-01-01     MMR            TRUE 2024-01-01    FALSE
#> 10:        1 2025-01-01     VZV            TRUE 2024-01-01    FALSE
#>     COMPLETED_PREVIOUSLY NEXT_DOSE_MIN NEXT_DOSE_RECOMMENDED    DUE  GIVEN
#>                   <lgcl>        <Date>                <Date> <lgcl> <lgcl>
#>  1:                FALSE    2024-02-12            2024-02-26   TRUE  FALSE
#>  2:                FALSE    2024-02-12            2024-02-26   TRUE  FALSE
#>  3:                FALSE    2024-02-12            2024-02-26   TRUE  FALSE
#>  4:                FALSE    2024-12-31            2024-12-31   TRUE  FALSE
#>  5:                FALSE    2024-01-01            2024-01-01   TRUE  FALSE
#>  6:                FALSE    2024-02-12            2024-02-26   TRUE  FALSE
#>  7:                FALSE    2024-12-31            2024-07-01   TRUE  FALSE
#>  8:                FALSE    2024-01-01            2024-01-01   TRUE  FALSE
#>  9:                FALSE    2024-12-31            2024-12-31   TRUE  FALSE
#> 10:                FALSE    2024-12-31            2024-12-31   TRUE  FALSE
#>     MISSED DELAYED_PRIOR_DOSE DELAYED_VISIT_DOSE DELAYED_NEXT_DOSE
#>     <lgcl>             <lgcl>             <lgcl>            <lgcl>
#>  1:   TRUE                 NA                 NA                NA
#>  2:   TRUE                 NA                 NA                NA
#>  3:   TRUE                 NA                 NA                NA
#>  4:   TRUE                 NA                 NA                NA
#>  5:   TRUE                 NA                 NA                NA
#>  6:   TRUE                 NA                 NA                NA
#>  7:   TRUE                 NA                 NA                NA
#>  8:   TRUE                 NA                 NA                NA
#>  9:   TRUE                 NA                 NA                NA
#> 10:   TRUE                 NA                 NA                NA
#>     NEXT_GIVEN_DATE NEXT_RCVD_15_DAYS NEXT_RCVD_30_DAYS NEXT_RCVD_90_DAYS
#>              <Date>            <lgcl>            <lgcl>            <lgcl>
#>  1:            <NA>             FALSE             FALSE             FALSE
#>  2:            <NA>             FALSE             FALSE             FALSE
#>  3:            <NA>             FALSE             FALSE             FALSE
#>  4:            <NA>             FALSE             FALSE             FALSE
#>  5:            <NA>             FALSE             FALSE             FALSE
#>  6:            <NA>             FALSE             FALSE             FALSE
#>  7:            <NA>             FALSE             FALSE             FALSE
#>  8:            <NA>             FALSE             FALSE             FALSE
#>  9:            <NA>             FALSE             FALSE             FALSE
#> 10:            <NA>             FALSE             FALSE             FALSE
#>     VISIT_MONTH   TOMORROW  YESTERDAY
#>           <num>     <Date>     <Date>
#>  1:           1 2025-01-02 2024-12-31
#>  2:           1 2025-01-02 2024-12-31
#>  3:           1 2025-01-02 2024-12-31
#>  4:           1 2025-01-02 2024-12-31
#>  5:           1 2025-01-02 2024-12-31
#>  6:           1 2025-01-02 2024-12-31
#>  7:           1 2025-01-02 2024-12-31
#>  8:           1 2025-01-02 2024-12-31
#>  9:           1 2025-01-02 2024-12-31
#> 10:           1 2025-01-02 2024-12-31

# Keep all possible visit–antigen pairs
evaluate_visits(visits, antigens, patients = NULL, full_return = TRUE)
#> Starting evaluation process for visits. Validating inputs.
#> validate_immunizations check complete - formatting data. This may take a while...
#> 
Processed 7 groups out of 15. 47% done. Time elapsed: 4s. ETA: 4s.
Processed 9 groups out of 15. 60% done. Time elapsed: 5s. ETA: 3s.
Processed 11 groups out of 15. 73% done. Time elapsed: 8s. ETA: 3s.
Processed 15 groups out of 15. 100% done. Time elapsed: 9s. ETA: 0s.
#> Data formatting completed, moving onto visit-antigen validate_immunizations.
#> Evaluating status of visits for POLIO vaccination status.
#> --Start with yesterday - calculate next date an immunization is due and previous dose information.
#> --Determine if a dose was given at the day of the visit and if so, was it delayed.
#> --Add in content from the next possible antigen given.
#> Evaluating status of visits for HIB vaccination status.
#> --Start with yesterday - calculate next date an immunization is due and previous dose information.
#> --Determine if a dose was given at the day of the visit and if so, was it delayed.
#> --Add in content from the next possible antigen given.
#> Evaluating status of visits for PCV vaccination status.
#> --Start with yesterday - calculate next date an immunization is due and previous dose information.
#> --Determine if a dose was given at the day of the visit and if so, was it delayed.
#> --Add in content from the next possible antigen given.
#> Evaluating status of visits for HEPA vaccination status.
#> --Start with yesterday - calculate next date an immunization is due and previous dose information.
#> --Determine if a dose was given at the day of the visit and if so, was it delayed.
#> --Add in content from the next possible antigen given.
#> Evaluating status of visits for HEPB vaccination status.
#> --Start with yesterday - calculate next date an immunization is due and previous dose information.
#> --Determine if a dose was given at the day of the visit and if so, was it delayed.
#> --Add in content from the next possible antigen given.
#> Evaluating status of visits for HPV vaccination status.
#> --Start with yesterday - calculate next date an immunization is due and previous dose information.
#> --Determine if a dose was given at the day of the visit and if so, was it delayed.
#> --Add in content from the next possible antigen given.
#> Evaluating status of visits for MCV vaccination status.
#> --Start with yesterday - calculate next date an immunization is due and previous dose information.
#> --Determine if a dose was given at the day of the visit and if so, was it delayed.
#> --Add in content from the next possible antigen given.
#> Evaluating status of visits for MENB vaccination status.
#> --Start with yesterday - calculate next date an immunization is due and previous dose information.
#> --Determine if a dose was given at the day of the visit and if so, was it delayed.
#> --Add in content from the next possible antigen given.
#> Evaluating status of visits for TETANUS vaccination status.
#> --Start with yesterday - calculate next date an immunization is due and previous dose information.
#> --Determine if a dose was given at the day of the visit and if so, was it delayed.
#> --Add in content from the next possible antigen given.
#> Evaluating status of visits for ROTA vaccination status.
#> --Start with yesterday - calculate next date an immunization is due and previous dose information.
#> --Determine if a dose was given at the day of the visit and if so, was it delayed.
#> --Add in content from the next possible antigen given.
#> Evaluating status of visits for COVID vaccination status.
#> --Start with yesterday - calculate next date an immunization is due and previous dose information.
#> --Determine if a dose was given at the day of the visit and if so, was it delayed.
#> --Add in content from the next possible antigen given.
#> Evaluating status of visits for RSV vaccination status.
#> --Start with yesterday - calculate next date an immunization is due and previous dose information.
#> --Determine if a dose was given at the day of the visit and if so, was it delayed.
#> --Add in content from the next possible antigen given.
#> Evaluating status of visits for MMR vaccination status.
#> --Start with yesterday - calculate next date an immunization is due and previous dose information.
#> --Determine if a dose was given at the day of the visit and if so, was it delayed.
#> --Add in content from the next possible antigen given.
#> Evaluating status of visits for VZV vaccination status.
#> --Start with yesterday - calculate next date an immunization is due and previous dose information.
#> --Determine if a dose was given at the day of the visit and if so, was it delayed.
#> --Add in content from the next possible antigen given.
#> Evaluating status of visits for INFLUENZA vaccination status.
#> --Start with yesterday - calculate next date an immunization is due and previous dose information.
#> --Determine if a dose was given at the day of the visit and if so, was it delayed.
#> --Add in content from the next possible antigen given.
#> Evaluation completed for all visits. Preparing return object as visit-antigen relation table.
#> See ?VISIT_RETURN_DEFS for explanations of return columns.
#>     STUDY_ID VISIT_DATE   ANTIGEN IS_VIRAL_SEASON        DOB AGED_OUT
#>        <int>     <Date>    <char>          <lgcl>     <Date>   <lgcl>
#>  1:        1 2025-01-01     POLIO            TRUE 2024-01-01    FALSE
#>  2:        1 2025-01-01       HIB            TRUE 2024-01-01    FALSE
#>  3:        1 2025-01-01       PCV            TRUE 2024-01-01    FALSE
#>  4:        1 2025-01-01      HEPA            TRUE 2024-01-01    FALSE
#>  5:        1 2025-01-01      HEPB            TRUE 2024-01-01    FALSE
#>  6:        1 2025-01-01       HPV            TRUE 2024-01-01    FALSE
#>  7:        1 2025-01-01       MCV            TRUE 2024-01-01    FALSE
#>  8:        1 2025-01-01      MENB            TRUE 2024-01-01    FALSE
#>  9:        1 2025-01-01   TETANUS            TRUE 2024-01-01    FALSE
#> 10:        1 2025-01-01      ROTA            TRUE 2024-01-01     TRUE
#> 11:        1 2025-01-01     COVID            TRUE 2024-01-01    FALSE
#> 12:        1 2025-01-01       RSV            TRUE 2024-01-01    FALSE
#> 13:        1 2025-01-01       MMR            TRUE 2024-01-01    FALSE
#> 14:        1 2025-01-01       VZV            TRUE 2024-01-01    FALSE
#> 15:        1 2025-01-01 INFLUENZA            TRUE 2024-01-01    FALSE
#>     COMPLETED_PREVIOUSLY NEXT_DOSE_MIN NEXT_DOSE_RECOMMENDED    DUE  GIVEN
#>                   <lgcl>        <Date>                <Date> <lgcl> <lgcl>
#>  1:                FALSE    2024-02-12            2024-02-26   TRUE  FALSE
#>  2:                FALSE    2024-02-12            2024-02-26   TRUE  FALSE
#>  3:                FALSE    2024-02-12            2024-02-26   TRUE  FALSE
#>  4:                FALSE    2024-12-31            2024-12-31   TRUE  FALSE
#>  5:                FALSE    2024-01-01            2024-01-01   TRUE  FALSE
#>  6:                FALSE    2032-12-31            2032-12-31  FALSE  FALSE
#>  7:                FALSE    2033-12-31            2034-12-31  FALSE  FALSE
#>  8:                FALSE    2040-01-01            2040-01-01  FALSE  FALSE
#>  9:                FALSE    2024-02-12            2024-02-26   TRUE  FALSE
#> 10:                FALSE    2024-02-12            2024-02-26  FALSE  FALSE
#> 11:                FALSE    2024-12-31            2024-07-01   TRUE  FALSE
#> 12:                FALSE    2024-01-01            2024-01-01   TRUE  FALSE
#> 13:                FALSE    2024-12-31            2024-12-31   TRUE  FALSE
#> 14:                FALSE    2024-12-31            2024-12-31   TRUE  FALSE
#> 15:                FALSE    2025-09-01            2025-09-01  FALSE  FALSE
#>     MISSED DELAYED_PRIOR_DOSE DELAYED_VISIT_DOSE DELAYED_NEXT_DOSE
#>     <lgcl>             <lgcl>             <lgcl>            <lgcl>
#>  1:   TRUE                 NA                 NA                NA
#>  2:   TRUE                 NA                 NA                NA
#>  3:   TRUE                 NA                 NA                NA
#>  4:   TRUE                 NA                 NA                NA
#>  5:   TRUE                 NA                 NA                NA
#>  6:  FALSE                 NA                 NA                NA
#>  7:  FALSE                 NA                 NA                NA
#>  8:  FALSE                 NA                 NA                NA
#>  9:   TRUE                 NA                 NA                NA
#> 10:  FALSE                 NA                 NA                NA
#> 11:   TRUE                 NA                 NA                NA
#> 12:   TRUE                 NA                 NA                NA
#> 13:   TRUE                 NA                 NA                NA
#> 14:   TRUE                 NA                 NA                NA
#> 15:  FALSE                 NA                 NA                NA
#>     NEXT_GIVEN_DATE NEXT_RCVD_15_DAYS NEXT_RCVD_30_DAYS NEXT_RCVD_90_DAYS
#>              <Date>            <lgcl>            <lgcl>            <lgcl>
#>  1:            <NA>             FALSE             FALSE             FALSE
#>  2:            <NA>             FALSE             FALSE             FALSE
#>  3:            <NA>             FALSE             FALSE             FALSE
#>  4:            <NA>             FALSE             FALSE             FALSE
#>  5:            <NA>             FALSE             FALSE             FALSE
#>  6:            <NA>             FALSE             FALSE             FALSE
#>  7:            <NA>             FALSE             FALSE             FALSE
#>  8:            <NA>             FALSE             FALSE             FALSE
#>  9:            <NA>             FALSE             FALSE             FALSE
#> 10:            <NA>             FALSE             FALSE             FALSE
#> 11:            <NA>             FALSE             FALSE             FALSE
#> 12:            <NA>             FALSE             FALSE             FALSE
#> 13:            <NA>             FALSE             FALSE             FALSE
#> 14:            <NA>             FALSE             FALSE             FALSE
#> 15:            <NA>             FALSE             FALSE             FALSE

#>           <num>     <Date>     <Date>
#>  1:           1 2025-01-02 2024-12-31
#>  2:           1 2025-01-02 2024-12-31
#>  3:           1 2025-01-02 2024-12-31
#>  4:           1 2025-01-02 2024-12-31
#>  5:           1 2025-01-02 2024-12-31
